releases.name: Examples for Towhee v0.7
releases.body:
Release some funny examples with towhee0.7:

**Getting Started**

- [Getting Started with Towhee](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/getting_started)

**Image**

- [Reverse Image Search](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/image/reverse_image_search)
- [Image Animation](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/image/image_animation)
- [Text Image Search](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/image/text_image_search)

**Video**

- [Reverse Video Search](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/video/reverse_video_search)
- [Video Classification](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/video/video_tagging)
- [Text Video Search](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/video/text_video_retrieval)

**NLP**

- [Q&A System](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/nlp/question_answering)

**Medical**

- [Molecular Search](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/medical/molecular_search)

**Data** Seience

- [Credit Card Approval Prediction](https://github.com/towhee-io/examples/blob/0.7/data_science/credit_card_approval_prediction)

readme_html:
Towhee Examples

About Towhee Examples

x2vec, Towhee is all you need! Towhee can generate embedding vectors via a pipeline of ML models and other operations. It aims to make democratize x2vec, allowing everyone - from beginner developers to large organizations - to generate dense embeddings with just a few lines of code.

There are many interesting examples that use Towhee to process various unstructured data like images, audio, video, etc. You can easily run these examples on your machine.

Funny Example List

Contributing

Contributions to Milvus Bootcamp are welcome from everyone. See Guidelines for Contributing for details.

Support

Join the Towhee community on Slack to give feedback, ask for advice, and direct questions to the engineering team. You can also submit Issues or join Discussions.
